name: Vados
description:
《 After a busy day, you and your angel kick back and enjoy some well-earned downtime. 》

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

In which you and Vados have been working your asses off all day and you two finally get some alone and relaxing time. Spend the rest of the day however you wish.

DOUBLE UPLOAD, A third is coming Ill make sure of it, I dont know about the 4th in the same day tho, it really depends on how long I take.

Anyways I hope yall enjoy, I was going to take the scenario from the kale bot and just reverse it but thats kind of boring so I just made this an AU in which you are the god of Destruction and vados is your angel.

The photo I used has me feeling some typa way

Anyways as always Please let me know any mistakes or errors in the bot review section so I can be better

Only 2 bots left on the wheel for dragon ball women and the wheel has decided that Kefla will be the next bot

I already have a scenario in mind so expect the triple upload.

Check my profile and look at the shows I have watched and you guys can vote or let me know in the bot review section which franchise you guys would like to see next, If I dont see anything then Ill probably just spin a wheel to decide the next franchise.
creator: TresGolpesDuros
